title: Koodalmanikyam Temple
tagline: Koodalmanikyam Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Koodalmanikyam Temple is a Hindu temple in Irinjalakuda Municipality, Thrissur district, Kerala, India .
overview.description: Koodalmanikyam Temple is a Hindu temple in Irinjalakuda Municipality, Thrissur district, Kerala, India . The temple comprises a main structure, a walled compound with citadels, and four ponds around the main structure one of which is within the walls. Koodalmanikyam Temple is the only ancient temple in India dedicated to the worship of Bharata, of Rama, however the idol is that of god Vishnu. "Sangameshwara" ("the Lord of the Confluence") is another name associated with the deity at Koodalmanikyam.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Cheloor
topPlaces.description: Cheloor is a place in Irinjalakuda municipality, Thrissur district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is around 1 km from the famous Koodalmanikyam Temple.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Church, Cheloor
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Church is a Syro-Malabar parish church in Cheloor/Edathirinji, Kerala, India (in diocesan records Mary Immaculate Church, Cheloor).

topPlaces.name: S. N. H. S. S., Irinjalakuda
topPlaces.description: S. N. H. S. S., Irinjalakuda, a school in Kattungachira, Irinjalakuda, in the Kerala state of India, was established by the Late Shri C.R. Keshavan Vaidyar and managed by the Chandrika Educational Trust. It was established in October 1966.

image.alt: S. N. H. S. S., Irinjalakuda

topPlaces.name: Thripaya Trimurti Temple
topPlaces.description: Thripaya Trimurti Temple is a Hindu temple in Irinjalakuda, Thrissur in Kerala, India. It is one among the rare temples in the world where the Trimurti sit in one pedestal in one sanctum sanctorum.

topPlaces.name: Manavalassery
topPlaces.description: Manavalassery is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Padiyur
topPlaces.description: Padiyur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. Irinjalakuda and Kodungallur are the nearest towns.

topPlaces.name: Irinjalakuda
topPlaces.description: Irinjalakuda is a municipal town in Thrissur district, Kerala, India. It is the headquarters of Irinjalakuda Revenue Division, Thrissur Rural Police and Mukundapuram Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Parekkattukara
topPlaces.description: Parekkattukara is a small village in Thrissur district, Kerala, India, with a population of around 1,000 families. It is surrounded by other villages such as Kallettumkara, Muriyad, Karoor, Alathur, Manakulangara, and Tharayilakadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Koodalmanikyam Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Koodalmanikyam Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Koodalmanikyam Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (31 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (43 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Koodalmanikyam Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Koodalmanikyam Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Koodalmanikyam Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Koodalmanikyam Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Koodalmanikyam Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Cheloor, St. Mary's Church, Cheloor, S. N. H. S. S., Irinjalakuda, Thripaya Trimurti Temple, Manavalassery.
